column2: Confirm PO is shipping to a restricted location
column3: Utilize Google to check product compliance laws for area that PO is shipping to

column2: Cancel PO via Bulk Cancellation tool
column3: Enter the PO or OPID# into the Bulk Order Cancellation tool to cancel the PO. Select Reason for Cancellation: OPS_ORDER_PROCESSING_ISSUE
Refresh the cancellation results to confirm the PO has been cancelled successfully.
Respond to the supplier utilizing the Cannot Ship to Location / Product Compliance template.

column2: Directly after sending the Response above, follow the instructions below to transfer to MCOMPLY
Change issue status to Waiting for Support before starting if necessary
column3: Utilize Change Status button in ServiceHub to change to correct status

column2: Open ticket in SupportHub to add SKUs (NOT Part Numbers) to 'Order' tab
column3: Use ‘Edit’ button on top left to open pop-up, then click on ‘Order’ Tab and enter SKUs into SKU field, then click ‘Update’

In SupportHub, select More > Move Select New Project: Merch Compliance (MCOMPLY) Select New Issue Type: Partner Home External Request Select New Status > Open Select Customer Request >Type: Compliance Findability Select Move to complete transfer

column2: After transferring, insert the template for internal comment
column3: Add template as an internal comment for the MCOMPLY agent, and provide the context for the request and/or actions taken
